strings.SS2_NEMCOMMANDO_DESCRIPTION:
Comando Némesis es una carta blanca en el campo de batalla, capaz de girar cualquier situación a su favor.<style=cSub>

< ! > Espada de Cesación es arriesgada pero puede provocar muchos daños al acumular Efusión.

< ! > Tajo Distante se puede usar para aplicar Efusión a un grupo de enemigos de forma segura - atraviesa enemigos!

< ! > Equilibrio de combate cuerpo a cuerpo y combate a distancia es clave, y Voltereta táctica proporciona armadura para entrar y salir de combates.

< ! > Sumisión se puede utilizar para atacar rápidamente enemigos, sea para escapar o para tener la ventaja sobre un objetivo.</style>


This mod was translated by: Jaosnake
strings.SS2_NEMCOMMANDO_OUTRO_FLAVOR: ... y se marcho, descubriendo una nueva sensación: humanidad.
strings.SS2_NEMCOMMANDO_OUTRO_FAILURE: ... y volvió, acabando su conflicto sin fin.
strings.SS2_NEMCOMMANDO_LORE:
He lays to rest by a fire, setting the weapons he carries within an arm's reach. Checking his surroundings, hoping the cave he hid in would be enough shelter. Some would say, it isn't wise to be overly cautious. He would say, <color=#FFCCED>they haven't seen enough.</color>

The service pistol he got when he enlisted. Well used, dirtied, and loved. It's brought him through thick and thin, no matter which mission he took on. Some would say, only a fool would trust their weapon. He would say, <color=#FFCCED>your weapon is all you can trust.</color>

The blade of a fallen brother of war. Picked from what he could scavenge of the last of humanity he's seen. Some would say, it keeps their spirits united. He would say, <color=#FFCCED>it's to keep their spirits from joining for as long as possible.</color>

The loads of cargo that landed with him. Each item picked from a chest, keeping him alive in one way or another. Dozens of shipments to anyone but him. Some would say, they aren't his items to take. He would say, <color=#FFCCED>if he doesn't take them, then no one will.</color>

The glow of a violet light coming from deeper within the cave. Calming, warming... beckoning. Welcoming him deeper and deeper, promising safety. Some would say, what sounds too good to be true probably is. He would say, <color=#FFCCED>Faust was a wise man.</color>
strings.SS2_KEYWORD_GOUGE: <style=cKeywordName>Efusión</style><style=cSub>Daña por 100% sobre el paso del tiempo, puede dar golpes críticos.
strings.SS2_KEYWORD_GOUGE2: <style=cKeywordName>Efusión</style><style=cSub>Aplica 100% de daño en el tiempo. Capaz de dar golpes críticos y activar efectos de objetos.</style>
strings.SS2_NEMCOMMANDO_SECONDARY_CONCUSSION_NAM: Sabor a conmoción cerebral de corte distante
strings.SS2_NEMCOMMANDO_SECONDARY_CONCUSSION_DES: <style=cIsDamage>Desbaste</style>. Dispara un rayo de espada <style=cIsDamage>piercing</style> para <style=cIsDamage>400% de daño</style>.
strings.SS2_NEMCOMMANDO_SECONDARY_BEAM_DESCRIPTI: <style=cIsDamage>Efusión.</style> Mantén para cargar un haz penetrante de hasta <style=cIsDamage>400% de daño</style>.
strings.SS2_NEMCOMMANDO_SECONDARY_SHOOT_DESCRIPT: <style=cIsUtility>Ágil.</style> Dispara tu pistola por <style=cIsDamage>150% de daño</style>.
strings.SS2_NEMCOMMANDO_UTILITY_DODGE_DESCRIPTIO: <style=cIsUtility>Rueda</style> una distancia corta, obteniendo <style=cIsUtility>200 de armadura</style>.
strings.SS2_NEMCOMMANDO_UTILITY_GRENADE_DESCRIPT: <style=cIsDamage>Stunning</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Leap backwards</style>, and throw 3 grenades that each deal <style=cIsDamage>380% damage</style>.
strings.SS2_NEMCOMMANDO_UTILITY_TAUNT_DESCRIPTIO: <style=cIsHealth>Taunt</style> enemigos cercanos, disminuyendo su <style=cIsDamage>armor</style> pero aumentando su <style=cIsDamage>damage</style>. Se puede mantener para acumular el efecto hasta <style=cIsDamage>3</style> veces.
strings.SS2_NEMCOMMANDO_SPECIAL_SUBMISSION_DESCR: <style=cIsUtility>Ágil.</style> <style=cIsUtility>Carga</style>, después dispara una salva de <style=cIsDamage>6 ráfagas de escopeta</style> por <style=cIsDamage>6x80% de daño</style> cada una. La cantidad de disparos aumenta con la velocidad de ataque.
strings.SS2_NEMCOMMANDO_SPECIAL_BOSS_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsDamage>Efusión.</style> <style=cIsUtility>Carga</style>, después <style=cIsUtility>embiste hacia delante</style> y desata una salva devastadora de 6 cortes que hacen hasta <style=cIsDamage>360% de daño</style> cada una.
strings.SS2_NEMCOMMANDO_SPECIAL_SCEPSUBMISSION_D:
<style=cIsUtility>Agile</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Charge up</style>, then fire a barrage of up to <style=cIsDamage>6 blasts of 4x70%.</style>. <style=cIsUtility>The number of shots increases with attack speed</style>. 
<color=#d299ff>SCEPTER: Additionally fires up to {0} lasers which deal {2}% damage.</color>
strings.SS2_NEMCOMMANDO_SPECIAL_SCEPBOSS_DESCRIP:
<style=cIsDamage>Gouging</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Charge up</style>, then <style=cIsUtility>dash forward</style> and unleash a devastating barrage of up to <style=cIsDamage>{0} slashes</style> that deal up to <style=cIsDamage>{1}% damage each</style>. <style=cIsUtility>The number of slashes increases with attack speed</style>. 
<color=#d299ff>SCEPTER: At full charge, briefly vanish, then unleash all of your strikes at once.</color>
strings.SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_NEMCOMMANDO_MASTERY_DESC: As Nemesis Commando, beat the game or obliterate on Monsoon or harder.
strings.SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_NEMCOMMANDO_GRANDMASTERY: As Nemesis Commando, beat the game or obliterate on Typhoon.
strings.SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_NEMCOMMANDO_NEMESIS_DESC: As Nemesis Commando, defeat Commando's vestige.
strings.SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_NEMCOMMANDO_BOSSATTACK_D: As Nemesis Commando, apply 8 or more stacks of Gouge to a single target at once.
strings.SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_NEMCOMMANDO_GRENADE_DESC: As Nemesis Commando, carry at least 20 Lunar items on Stage 8.
strings.SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_NEMCOMMANDO_SWORDBEAM_DE: As Nemesis Commando, reach 100% bleed chance.
